content.speakerText: Thanks so much! So, 5 books, 2 weeks, can renew online?
content.speakerTextCn: 太感谢了！就是5本、两周、能在线续借，对吧？

options.text: Exactly! Have a great day reading!
Sure, I'll send you the books tomorrow.
Actually, the due date is next Monday.
You can't renew online, you need to come in person.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'Exactly! Have a great day reading!' 是对确认信息的礼貌回应，既确认了细节又表达了祝福。选项2错误地承诺送书，与对话场景不符；选项3和4否定了对方确认的信息，与 'Exactly!' 的肯定语气矛盾。

options.text: See you then! Bring your library card!
Oh, I'm sorry, we're closed next week.
Do you want to borrow more books?
Bye, don't forget to pay your fine.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'See you then! Bring your library card!' 是积极回应并补充关键提示，符合道别场景。选项2直接否定对方计划，不礼貌；选项3是新话题，偏离道别语境；选项4引入负面信息（罚款），破坏友好氛围。

content.speakerText: Alright, I'm heading out now. Thanks for your help!
content.speakerTextCn: 好了，我要走了，谢谢你的帮助！

options.text: You're welcome! Have a wonderful day!
I hope you come back soon.
No problem. See you next time.

content.explanation: 正确答案 'You're welcome! Have a wonderful day!' 是标准、礼貌且完整的道别回应，包含感谢回应和祝福。选项2是提醒物品，属于新信息，打断道别流程；选项3虽礼貌但不如选项1自然；选项4虽然可接受，但缺少祝福语，不如正确答案完整。
